children.text: Bull’s Head sits along the High Ridge Road corridor in North Stamford, and it’s known for being one of the city’s most convenient places to live day-to-day. The area offers a straightforward rhythm—quiet residential pockets paired with a strong set of nearby services—so it’s a favorite for buyers who value ease without giving up a neighborhood feel.

Housing in and around Bull’s Head is varied. You’ll see traditional single-family homes on tree-lined streets alongside condos and smaller multifamily options closer to the main routes. That variety tends to attract a wide range of buyers—from first-time purchasers and downsizers to commuters who want quick access to the parkway and downtown Stamford.

What anchors Bull’s Head is the High Ridge Center shopping area, located on High Ridge Road just off Exit 35 of the Merritt Parkway. With everything from groceries to dining and everyday services nearby, it’s the kind of neighborhood where you can keep life efficient—and still be a short drive from Stamford’s restaurants, waterfront, and Metro-North at the Stamford Transportation Center when you want to head into the city.

highlights: Shopping and dining hub close to home for daily convenience
Convenient access to major highways for commuting around Fairfield County
A practical mix of housing types - single-family homes plus condo options
Easy drive to downtown Stamford dining, events, and Metro-North service
Family-friendly neighborhood with good access to schools and parks
name: Bull's Head
overview: Bull’s Head is one of Stamford’s most convenient “everyday” neighborhoods—centered along High Ridge Road with a strong mix of residential streets and a true retail hub close by. You’ll find a blend of classic single-family homes and smaller multifamily/condo options, with the feel shifting from quiet side streets to a lively commercial corridor. The lifestyle here is defined by ease: errands, coffee, and groceries are minutes away, and you can be on the Merritt Parkway quickly. If you want North Stamford convenience without feeling far from downtown Stamford, Bull’s Head is a practical, well-located choice.
